chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1332 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Non-Prosecution 04-09-2025 Petitioners are called absent. **** Petitioners, who maintain this petition in person, are called absent; no intimation is received so far; same was the position on the last date of hearing; even compliance of office objections has also not been made, which shows that the petitioners have lost their interest in proceeding with this matter. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s), if any. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
